Research Ethics Committee
The Committee’s purpose is to constantly propagate among the researchers. The importance of adherence to integrity through training sessions and posters and investigate into cases of code of conduct and ethics violation.
OBJECTIVES
Promoting ethical research practices through training sessions, workshops, and awareness initiatives such as posters and seminars.
Ensuring adherence to research integrity by guiding researchers on ethical compliance and responsible conduct.
Investigating and addressing any cases of code of conduct or ethics violations, ensuring appropriate actions are taken to maintain
academic and research credibility.
MODES OF GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL
Drop a letter in Grievance/Suggestion Box available in front of the office.
Mail to
grc@sece.ac.in
Use online Grievance module through Impress ERP using My performance module.
Reach out to GRC members through their Mobile numbers.
